name: Vamos Auto
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in Arlington and Houston offering in-house auto financing to borrowers with poor credit, bankruptcies, or no credit history.
description_long:
Vamos Auto is a used car dealership operating locations in Arlington, Texas and Houston, Texas that specializes in Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) financing for consumers with less than perfect credit. The company was recently acquired under new ownership described as family-owned and veteran-owned. They position themselves as an alternative to traditional auto lenders and banks by offering direct, in-house financing without third-party lenders or lengthy approval processes.

The company's core service is providing auto loans for used vehicles, primarily trucks and SUVs. Their financing model targets customers who have experienced bankruptcies, repossessions, late payments, or have no credit history. They advertise a stated goal of 100% approval rates and claim employment is the primary qualifying factor rather than credit scores. Vamos Auto also offers vehicle trade-in services, accepting cars for purchase even from non-buyers, and online payment processing through PayNearMe. Their inventory includes vehicles priced from approximately $24,000 to $39,000 based on listed examples.

Vamos Auto distinguishes itself through its explicit focus on subprime auto lending and rapid approval via text-based technology. They emphasize accessibility for rejected borrowers, using the tagline that their dealership "says yes when others say no." The company offers a warranty on every vehicle and maintains two physical locations with in-person payment options. Their marketing emphasizes employment status over credit metrics and the ability to work with individual circumstances.

The primary caveat is that this is fundamentally a for-profit subprime auto lender, not a credit-building service. While they advertise fast approvals and accessibility, BHPH dealerships typically charge significantly higher interest rates and fees than traditional lenders. The business model relies on in-house financing collection and vehicle repossession rights. No specific APR, term lengths, payment amounts, or fee structures are disclosed on the website, making true cost comparison impossible from available information.
pros: Fast online pre-approval using text-based technology with stated goal of 100% approval rate
In-house financing with no banks or third-party lenders involved, eliminating intermediary delays
Employment-based qualifying (stated as primary factor) rather than credit score requirements
Accepts applicants with bankruptcies, repossessions, late payments, and no credit history
Two physical locations (Arlington and Houston) with in-person payment and service options
Vehicle warranty included on every car sold
Buy Here Pay Here model allows trade-ins and will purchase vehicles from non-buyers
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
BHPH dealerships typically charge significantly higher rates and fees than traditional auto lenders
Limited vehicle inventory shown (55 used vehicles across two locations with high price points $24K-$39K)
No information about payment plans, loan terms, down payment requirements, or monthly payment amounts
In-house financing model typically includes strict payment collection and repossession terms not detailed on site
best_for: Borrowers with poor credit, recent bankruptcy, or repossession history denied by traditional auto lenders
Self-employed or gig workers with stable income but limited credit history or documentation
Buyers in Dallas/Fort Worth or Houston areas needing immediate vehicle access with flexible employment verification
diagnosis: Vamos Auto is best for subprime borrowers in Texas with employment income but damaged or absent credit history who need immediate vehicle access and cannot qualify for traditional auto loans. The main caveat is that specific pricing, APR, and loan terms are not disclosed, and BHPH financing typically carries substantially higher costs than conventional lenders—making detailed rate comparison essential before commitment.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
Online pre-approval application via web form
Vehicle trade-in and purchase (accepts non-buyer trade-ins)
Online and in-person payment processing via PayNearMe
Vehicle warranties on all sold cars
Two physical dealership locations with test drive scheduling
Financing for applicants with no credit history
Subprime auto lending for bankruptcy/repossession/late payment applicants
